mapper.sql: id, post_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, author_id, author_name, content, like_count, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, author_id, author_name, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToId}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
